title: 50-lesson milestone: speed test
description: Halfway through the course — pure speed check on real prose
text: Fifty lessons in. You started with home row and now you can write anything. Push your speed today. Read ahead, trust your hands, and stay smooth — accuracy stays at ninety-three percent.

tips.text: Fifty lessons in. That is the halfway mark, and you earned every page of it.
Clear 45 WPM here and you are well on your way to 80 and past it. No shortcuts got you this far; persistence did.

tips.target: Fifty lessons in. You started with home row and now you can write anything. Push your

tips.text: Set a clean best today and remember the feel of it. You will return to that pace many times before long.

tips.target: speed today. Read ahead, trust your hands, and stay smooth — accuracy stays at ninety-three percent.

character_tips.anna: Halfway. Look at that WPM number and don't shrug it off; you put in the hours for it. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.maxim: A checkpoint, not a finish line. Note your number; the back half will lift it higher. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.knopych: Midpoint reached. Catch your breath, then keep the same steady hands. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.klavochka: Half the road behind you. Quiet pride is allowed; then back to work. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
